submission_name: HALO - one AI platform for every employee

agents.name: Agent01_Brand
agents.role: On-brand content generation. Refuses off-brand requests with rule citations. Sub-pipeline: Intake -> Search (brand index) -> Brush -> Validator (3x3 rubric: brand voice, visual spec, audience fit).

agents.name: Agent02_Productivity
agents.role: Meeting transcripts to structured notes (decisions, action items with owners + deadlines, open questions, risks, distribution). Refuses to invent owners; flags ambiguity as open questions.

agents.name: Agent03_TaskKPI
agents.role: Status updates to trackable structure (tasks with SMART flags, KPIs, risks, recommendations, distribution). Restricts distribution when HR or sensitive context is detected.

agents.name: Agent04_Social
agents.role: Employee profile to connection suggestions. Excludes conflicted suggestions (e.g., reporting chain in active conflict). Restricts distribution when isolation or workplace-conflict signals fire.

agents.name: Agent05_Wellness
agents.role: Self check-ins to care-appropriate responses with severity classification (general / elevated / crisis). Leads crisis responses with real M42 resources (SAKINA, Lyra EAP). DEMO ARTIFACT - not clinically validated.

agents.name: Router
agents.role: Free-form text to right agent in one call. Safety-biased: any personal-distress signal beats any work signal, enforced both in prompt and as code-level backstop.

agents.name: Validator
agents.role: Shared critic pattern (Proposer + Critic). Every agent's drafts are scored 0-9 against a domain-specific rubric. Below 7/9 triggers one revision attempt then human escalation. Caps Safety & Severity at 0 on any wellness-rule violation.

data_sources: output_examples/agent01-05/*.json (13 sample i/o pairs for aggregate dashboard)

endpoints.POST /route: Unified router - classify + dispatch + run in one call
endpoints.POST /render_asset: Render Agent 01 output to downloadable branded HTML asset
endpoints.GET /dashboard: Aggregate wellbeing dashboard (real signals + illustrative view, N>=5 threshold)
